ALL PROJECTS ABOUT AWARDS CONTACT

Gathering Stars on the Roof

Lijiang, China
Overview

The design of "Gathering Stars on the Roof" reshapes the concept of vacation living. It is not just a dwelling but also a stage that offers ultimate experiences. With its unique climbable roof design, it transforms every night into an unforgettable journey through the stars. Here, every moment is a new exploration, and every day is an unknown adventure. Each rooftop is an invitation for travelers to step into a celestial voyage, where tiles embrace the stars, dancing together in the vast universe. Life here transcends the confines of city walls and becomes deeply intertwined with nature, exploring the wilderness of luxury and experiencing unknown challenges.

Location
Lijiang, China
Client
Blossom House 花间堂
Type
Hospitality
Status
Winner
Team
Yuanyuan Dong, Yue He, Nuo Xu
Awards
Blossom House × IMBOX Glamping Resort House Design Competition 2023 — Top 4 Winner + People's Choice Award

The façade combines natural timber with reflective surfaces, allowing the architecture to blend seamlessly into its surroundings—forests, mountains, plains, and waterways. Acting almost like an invisible painter, the building captures and reflects the changing landscape, dissolving the boundary between architecture and nature.

The façade strategy embodies ESG-oriented design principles, prioritizing ecological sensitivity and environmental stewardship while supporting social responsibility and long-term sustainable value.
